rules.directive: Capture+host real images/video/gradient from source; no flat fills or placeholder boxes where source has imagery.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (asset_capture, 4×): no canvas/video vs source has 1 canvas / 0 video

rules.directive: Author every top-level source section; verify clone page-height is within ~15% of source before grading.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (section_completeness, 2×): clone 1109px tall vs source 20441px

rules.directive: Match source computed type (size/weight/family/tracking) per element; do not default headings to bold or system fonts.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (typography_match, 4×): weight 700 vs 300

rules.directive: Extract from rendered DOM (Playwright), not raw HTML; capture JS-loaded sections/logos/tickers.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (structure_parser, 2×): 1 headings vs 57

rules.directive: Reproduce detected source hover/scroll motion via joist-* classes; grader must verify it fires.
rules.rationale: Auto-derived from grader defect (motion_runtime, 2×): clone hover-change 0.00% vs source 0.45%
